items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
The small lucky bag has become a fashion staple for girls in recent years. Its elegant and simple style has won the love of people of all ages. The interior is made of tech nylon, which is lightweight and easy to clean. Even when carrying many items, it helps reduce the burden. The strap features a knot design, allowing for easy adjustment. It can be used as a handbag; after tightening the drawstring, it looks like a cloud bag, making it perfect for summer outfits. Dimensions: 21*16.6*1CM3005s

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
Summer Woven Zip Crossbody Bag A crossbody bag that doubles as a makeup bag, featuring exquisite weaving and a compact body. It is an essential accessory for the upcoming summer. The double zipper offers better protection, and the large capacity makes it a must-have. Style No.: 789109 Dimensions: 22*12.5*5cm

items.name_cn:
Bottega Veneta
This Cassette woven cube bag is simple, handsome, understated yet luxurious.
Latest model features a triangle logo pattern on the side! A very commuting-friendly bag. The design is simple yet showcases BV's classic weaving art, making it very easy to match with everyday outfits. Every color is sophisticated, and all are made of soft lambskin, looking very textured. Stylish and chic when worn.
Crossbody, shoulder, or clutch. Unisex.
Size: 23*15*5.5
Style No.: 80820#

items.name_cn:
Bottega Veneta
This (Denim) Cassette woven cube bag is simple, cool, low-key, and luxurious.
The latest version features a triangle logo pattern on the side! A very commuter-friendly bag with a simple shape and Bottega Veneta's classic weaving art. It is very easy to match with everyday outfits. Every color is premium, and they are all made of soft lambskin, looking very textured. Stylish and chic when worn.
Can be worn over the shoulder, crossbody, or clutch. Unisex.
Size: 23*15*5.5
Style No.: 80820#

items.name_cn:
Bottega Veneta
Material: Paper Wax Calfskin🍂
Craftsmanship: The Intrecciato technique makes the handbag soft yet durable, with vertical weaving amplifying Bottega's classic DNA✌️❤️
Function: Crossbody, shoulder, or clutch✨👻
Spacious capacity, perfect for daily essentials like an umbrella☂️ and electronics. A top choice for tall individuals.
Model: 691407
Dimensions: 36*23*4.5
